channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republicans turn ballroom fight into referendum on Trump's safety
item.description: Senate Republican leaders plan to turn the political fight over the $1 billion request for security upgrades tied to the new White House ballroom into...

item.title: Trump weighs military action against Iran with ceasefire "on life support"
item.description: President Trump is meeting with his national security team Monday to discuss the way forward in the Iran war, including possibly resuming military act...

item.title: America is scaling sin in real time. We're all paying for it.
item.description: Las Vegas has long been known as Sin City for its 24/7 access to all kinds of indecencies. America is quickly becoming Sin Nation. Or, as President Tr...

item.title: Health program cuts hit home, fueling blame game
item.description: Sweeping changes that congressional Republicans made to the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid are starting to take effect, fueling an election-year bla...
